body: Had my bunion surgery 2 weeks ago and the recovery has been tough but doable. Ice, elevation, and pain meds are my best friends right now. My surgeon said I should be walking normally in about 8 weeks total.
title: 2 weeks post-op bunion surgery

comments.comment_text: I wore Hoka shoes during my recovery and they were a lifesaver
The swelling took forever to go down for me. Physical therapy really helped though.

body: Just had Lapiplasty done last month. Less pain than traditional bunion surgery and recovery seems to be going faster. Really happy with my surgeon's recommendation on this approach.
title: One month into Lapiplasty recovery

comments.comment_text: The 3D approach really does make a difference. I could put weight on my foot earlier than my friend who had traditional surgery.

body: Hammer toe fusion surgery was last month. The toe mobility is returning slowly but I'm having some nerve pain still. Has anyone else experienced this?
title: Hammer toe post-fusion pain

comments.comment_text: Nerve pain is normal after toe surgery. Mine took 3 months to settle down. Don't worry too much.
